results.rendered_html:
1. asapatna (von 3. a + sapatnī)
1〉 adj. f. ī.
a〉 ohne Nebengattin, — Nebenbuhlerin: asapatnī sapatnaghnī jayantyabhibhūvarī  ṚV. 10,139,5 .
— b〉 ohne Nebenbuhler, unangefochten: asapatnaḥ sapatnahābhirāṣṭro viṣāsahiḥ  ṚV. 10,174,5 .  AV. 10,6,30 . 12,1,41 . 19,14,1 . 46,7 .  VS. 7,25 . 9,40 . 10,18 . śrīḥ  ŚAT. BR. 2,4,4,6 . 3,8,2,3 . 8,5,1,3 . so heisst eine iṣṭakā (hier f. ā) 8,5,1,4 . 10,2,5,13 .  KĀTY. ŚR. 17,4,1 . 6 . 7,15 . gāṇapatyaṃ ca vindati . samṛddhamasapatnaṃ ca śriyā yuktam  MBH. 3,4093 .
— 2〉 n. unangefochtener Zustand, Frieden  AV. 8,5,17 . 9,2,7 . 19,16,1 .

asapatna a.
1 Without a rival wife.
2 Not an enemy, friendly.
(pb)

— tnaṃ Undisturbed condition, peace.
— tnī A sort of brick (iṣṭakābhedaḥ).
